{{Quote|I will tell you of Sith weapons, but only if you vow to use them, for nothing displeases me more than to know that a weapon gathers dust.|Komok-Da|<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>}}
'''Komok-Da''' was a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] of the old [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]], hailing from the [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith species]], and a weapons master. His spirit dwelt in [[Bo Vanda]]'s [[Bo Vanda's holocron|holocron]] along with her spirit, and that of Lord [[Kla (Sith)|Kla]].

He had great knowledge of various weapons, including [[Sith poison]] and [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. He seemed to be an academic, not caring who learned his arts. In truth he was obsessed with his weapons, and would only share his knowledge with those who would kill in cold blood for that very purpose. The Sith Lord [[Kherus]], who lived during the era of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], was considered a disciple of Komok-Da.
